summary: Comprehensive testing of Mobile Google Auth Bug Fix (Iteration 8). All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested successfully. The fix addresses mobile browsers losing #session_id hash fragment during redirect chains.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns ok
Backend: POST /api/auth/session returns 400 without session_id
Backend: POST /api/auth/session returns 401 for invalid session_id
Backend: POST /api/auth/session handles invalid session gracefully (401)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without cookie
Backend: GET /api/auth/me works with Bearer token
Backend: GET /api/news still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/widgets/weather still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/support/faq still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/organizations still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/reviews still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/profile returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/reviews/pending-verification returns 401 without auth
Backend: Cookie set with samesite='none' and secure=True (verified in code line 252)
Backend: Cookie delete with samesite='none' and secure=True (verified in code line 271)
Frontend: Login page renders with consent checkboxes (data-testid='consent-checkbox')
Frontend: Login page renders with age checkbox (data-testid='age-checkbox')
Frontend: Google login button exists (data-testid='google-login-btn')
Frontend: Google login button is DISABLED when checkboxes unchecked
Frontend: Google login button is ENABLED after checking both boxes
Frontend: Google login button href redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with redirect=/auth/callback
Frontend: /auth/callback route exists and is NOT protected (does not redirect to /login)
Frontend: /auth/callback without session_id shows error page (data-testid='auth-error')
Frontend: /auth/callback error page has retry button (data-testid='auth-retry-btn')
Frontend: /auth/callback error page has correct button text 'Попробовать снова'
Frontend: /auth/callback error page shows mobile help tip (mentions browser/messenger)
Frontend: /auth/callback with #session_id=test_value shows error after processing invalid session
Frontend: Protected routes (/dashboard, /news, /verify) redirect to /login when not authenticated
Frontend: Backward compat - /dashboard#session_id=xxx redirects to /auth/callback#session_id=xxx
Frontend: Mobile viewport (390x844): login page renders correctly without horizontal scroll
Frontend: Mobile viewport: all login elements visible
Frontend: Mobile viewport: auth/callback error page renders correctly without horizontal scroll
Frontend: Mobile viewport: retry button visible on error page
critical_code_review_comments: Cookie samesite changed from 'lax' to 'none' for better mobile browser compatibility
Dedicated /auth/callback route added (NOT protected) to handle auth redirects
AuthCallback.js implements multi-source session_id extraction: hash, query params, regex, sessionStorage
Backward compatibility: if session_id appears in hash on any page, redirects to /auth/callback
Error UI includes mobile-specific help tip about opening in browser (not messenger)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all mobile auth fix features working correctly)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test session from iteration 7: test_session_iteration7_token
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile Google Auth Bug Fix is fully functional. Key changes: 1) /auth/callback route is NOT protected, 2) Cookie samesite='none' and secure=True, 3) AuthCallback extracts session_id from multiple sources (hash, query, regex, sessionStorage), 4) Backward compat redirects any page with #session_id to /auth/callback. Test session: test_session_iteration7_token. All mobile viewports tested (390x844 iPhone 14).
